name: Tooltip
description: A popup that displays information related to an element when the element receives keyboard focus or the mouse hovers over it.
whenToUse: Use for icon button labels, additional context, abbreviated text expansion, and helpful hints.

props.name: delayDuration
props.description: Delay in ms before showing the tooltip

props.name: side
props.description: The preferred side of the trigger to render
